name: mception
description: Audits other MCP servers for security risks and returns safe / caution / unsafe verdicts.
long_description: mception is a meta-MCP: it registers as an MCP server and exposes tools that audit OTHER MCP servers for tool poisoning, prompt injection, SSRF, command injection, credential exfiltration, supply-chain risk, rug-pulls, and lethal-trifecta composition across multiple servers in one config. Point it at a local path, an npm / PyPI package, a git repo, or a Docker image, and it returns one of: safe_to_use, use_with_caution, unsafe_to_use, inconclusive. 46 rules across 6 categories; supports servers written in Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Go, or Rust. No API key required — the optional LLM judge uses the MCP sampling primitive so the host agent's own model responds.

tools.name: audit_server
tools.description: Audit one MCP server (local / npm / PyPI / git / docker).

tools.name: audit_config
tools.description: Audit a whole MCP client config and apply cross-config rules.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Render a persisted audit as Markdown, JSON, or SARIF.

tools.name: list_findings
tools.description: Filter findings of an audit by severity / category.

tools.name: predicted_audit_id
tools.description: Compute the deterministic audit ID for a target.

tools.name: rescan_diff
tools.description: Compare current MCP surface to pinned baseline (rug-pull detection).

tools.name: refresh_target_baseline
tools.description: Accept the current MCP surface as the new baseline.

enable_llm_judge.title: Enable LLM judge
enable_llm_judge.description: Set to '1' to classify ambiguous tool descriptions using the host's own model via MCP sampling. No API key needed. Advisory-only — cannot flip a verdict to unsafe alone.

offline_mode.title: Offline mode
offline_mode.description: Set to '1' to block all outbound network calls (OSV, npm, PyPI, git, phantom-repo probes). Local-path audits still work fully.

data_dir.title: Data directory
data_dir.description: Where audit reports and rug-pull baselines are stored.

introspect_timeout_s.title: Introspection timeout (seconds)
introspect_timeout_s.description: Per-target cap on introspection time. Raise this for large monorepos or slow networks.
